questions.assertion: Assertion (A): Essay writing is an essential skill for students.
questions.reason: Reason (R): It helps in developing critical thinking, creativity, and effective communication skills.
opts: (A) Both A and R are true and R is the correct explanation of A
(B) Both A and R are true but R is not the correct explanation of A
(C) A is true but R is false
(D) A is false but R is true
